title: Intro call — Emma Wilson
prep: Emma asked for a quick call this week. Likely agenda: partnership fit and next steps. Review her email thread before joining.
questions: What outcome does Emma want from a partnership?
What's her timeline and who else is involved on her side?

title: Video review sync — Aisha Rahman
prep: Aisha is waiting on feedback for the latest cut. Watch it before the call and prepare timestamped notes.
questions: Are the product mentions accurate in the current cut?
Does the publish window still work for both sides?

follow_up.subject: Recap & next steps — video review
follow_up.summary: We reviewed the current cut together. The intro lands well; two timestamps need a tighter product mention. Aisha will revise and Theo will confirm the publish window after the team's review.

todos.task: Confirm publish window after team review

title: Collaboration structure — Noah Bennett
prep: Noah asked how collaborations are structured. Walk through the pilot model: smaller base fee plus revenue share, room to grow.
questions: What content formats is Noah planning?
Is he open to a revenue-share pilot before a larger flat fee?
